user_story: As a System admin, I want to add a new tracking device, so that attendance can be captured at entry and exit points
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Tracking Device screen; When I click Add new tracking device and provide a device name, office location, work area, entry/exit type, tracking mode and alert email; Then the device is saved and listed

user_story: As a System admin, I want to view tracking devices with their location, work area, entry/exit, tracking mode and alert email, so that I can manage all attendance devices
acceptance_criteria: Given tracking devices exist; When I open the Tracking Device screen; Then each device is listed with its name, office location, work area, entry/exit, tracking mode and alert email

user_story: As a System admin, I want to configure the email address alerts are sent to for a device, so that the right person is notified about device issues
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring a tracking device; When I set the "Alerts be sent to (email)" address; Then device alerts are delivered to that email

user_story: As a System admin, I want to edit an existing tracking device, so that I can keep device details and locations accurate
acceptance_criteria: Given a tracking device is listed; When I click EditAttendanceDevice and update the details; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As a System admin, I want to refresh the tracking device list, so that I always see the latest devices
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Tracking Device screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
